dt-example.title: API
dt-example.info:
When you use `$().DataTable()`, the returned object is a [DataTables API instance](https://datatables.net/manual/api), which can be used to control the DataTable. This example matches the [row adding example](../api/add_row.html), using jQuery for the initialisation and event handling.
It is worth noting that DataTables will also add a `$().dataTable()` (lower case `d`) method to jQuery, which will initialise a DataTable the same way as `$().DataTable()` but will return a jQuery instance, allowing chaining of jQuery methods if you require.
